presignedUrl.description: Presigned URL for downloading the image (undefined if generation failed)

storeable.description: Whether component can be made ahead

schema.description: Frontend URL to return to after login; must be in the allowed origin list

parameters.description: Frontend URL to return to after login; must be in the allowed origin list
parameters.name: redirect_uri

302.description: Redirects the browser to the Cognito hosted UI authorize endpoint. Sets oauth_state, oauth_nonce and oauth_redirect cookies.

schema.description: Must match the oauth_state cookie set during login

parameters.description: Must match the oauth_state cookie set during login
parameters.name: state

302.description: Redirects to the stored frontend URL on success (with a session cookie set), or to the same URL with ?error=auth_failed on failure.

bookcase.description: One or more bookcase images. Multiple files can be uploaded with the same field name.

post.description: Exchange a Cognito JWT for a long-lived MCP JWT token

get.description: Get all recipes for the authenticated user

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token

get.description: Search recipes by name, description, ingredients, or instructions

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token

delete.description: Delete a recipe for the authenticated user

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token

get.description: Get the meal plan for the authenticated user

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token

put.description: Update the meal plan for the authenticated user

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token

get.description: Get aggregated shopping list from recipes in the meal plan, optionally filtered by date range

schema.description: Array of Unix timestamps (milliseconds) to include in shopping list

parameters.description: Array of Unix timestamps (milliseconds) to include in shopping list
parameters.name: dates

meals.description: List of meals this ingredient belongs to

schema.description: Array of shopping list items with ingredient, quantity, and category

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Generate a signed GET URL for downloading files from S3

signedUrl.description: Signed GET URL valid for download

post.description: Generate a signed PUT URL for uploading files to S3

signedUrl.description: Signed PUT URL valid for upload

key.description: S3 object key where file will be stored

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Parse natural language recipe text and save to the user account

recipeText.description: Natural language recipe text to parse

recipeId.description: Recipe UUID for editing existing recipes

imageKey.description: S3 key of the image to associate with this recipe (from presigned upload endpoint)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing JWT token
